title: Find the Occurrence of First Almost Equal Substring
performanceTarget: top 1% execution time and overall performance
note: C proposal for this challenge: the minimum-footprint champion. Recommended and speed proposals are in C++ (see crossReferences).

variants.languageReason: C has the smallest runtime/stdlib baseline among the allowed native languages and accepts LeetCode char* input directly. The virtual joined-string accessor avoids allocating concatenated or reversed buffers.
variants.approachJustification: Run Z twice over a virtual pattern + delimiter + s view, first forward and then reversed, reusing the same Z buffer and keeping only left-window matches.

reasoningSummary: The C memory variant keeps the same prefix/suffix Z proof but reduces allocation overhead by indexing the joined and reversed strings virtually while reusing one Z buffer.
